title: Connect Admin Dashboard to Backend Database

requirements.text: Implement backend query function to retrieve all submitted assessments with details including student name, score, total questions, submission timestamp, and answers breakdown

quotes: Admin Dashboard mein submitted assessments ki list nahi dikh rahi
Assessment data store karne ke liye proper functions banaunga
Admin ke liye assessments list retrieve karne ka endpoint

acceptanceCriteria: Backend function returns array of all assessment submissions
Each assessment includes id, studentName, score, totalQuestions, submittedAt timestamp, and detailed answers
Function is accessible to admin users only

requirements.text: Implement backend function to calculate and return admin dashboard statistics including total assessment count, average score, alert users count, and recent submissions count

quotes: Stats cards (Total Assessments, Average Score, etc.) update nahi ho rahe
Stats calculate karne ka logic (total count, average score, etc.)

acceptanceCriteria: Function returns total count of all assessments
Function calculates and returns average score across all assessments
Function returns count of users in alert category (low scores)
Function returns count of assessments submitted in last 7 days

requirements.text: Update useQueries hook to fetch real assessment data from backend using the new query functions instead of returning empty arrays

quotes: Backend se data fetch karne ke liye React Query hooks
abhi admin dashboard backend se connect nahi hai

acceptanceCriteria: useAdminAssessments hook calls backend query function and returns assessment list
Loading states are properly handled during data fetch
Error states are handled and displayed to user
Data is properly transformed from backend format to frontend AdminAssessmentRow type

requirements.text: Connect QuickStatsCards component to display real statistics from backend data instead of calculating from empty arrays

quotes: Stats cards ko real data se populate karuga
Stats cards (Total Assessments, Average Score) update nahi ho rahe

acceptanceCriteria: Total Assessments card displays actual count from backend
Average Score card shows calculated average from all submissions
Alert Users card shows count of users with low scores
Recent Submissions card shows count of assessments from last 7 days
All cards update in real-time when new assessments are submitted

requirements.text: Connect UserAssessmentDataTable component to display the list of submitted assessments fetched from backend with all filtering and sorting functionality working on real data

quotes: Submitted assessments ki proper list with details
Dono me se koi na ho raha, List and Card koi na show ho raha

acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all submitted assessments from backend
Search filter works on student names
Date range filter works on submission timestamps
Score range filter works on assessment scores
Sorting functionality works on all columns
Pagination works correctly with real data
CSV export includes all real assessment data

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve existing assessment submission flow that generates success message and Assessment Report
Use existing AdminAssessmentRow type structure from frontend/src/types/admin.ts
Maintain compatibility with existing filtering, sorting, and pagination logic in UserAssessmentDataTable
nonGoals: Changing the assessment submission UI or flow
Modifying the assessment results page or report generation
Adding new statistics beyond the four existing stat cards
Changing the admin dashboard layout or styling
Adding user authentication beyond existing admin check
